title: A Open One-Step RT-qPCR for SARS-CoV-2 detection
author: Ariel Cerda
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Sequences of the plasmids needed to purify the required enzymes for a standardized One-Step open RT-qPCR protocol to detect SARS-CoV-2 RNA in clinical samples. Supplementary Information
steps_raw: Sequences of the plasmids needed to purify the required enzymes for a standardized One-Step open RT-qPCR protocol to detect SARS-CoV-2 RNA in clinical samples. Supplementary Information
